params.initialBudget: Daily budget in USDT (6 decimals, e.g. 50e6 = 50 USDT)

execute(address,uint256,bytes).details: Used by the AI agent to call any contract (e.g. ArepaHub, OTCMarket)

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

processX402Payment(address,uint256,strin.details: Called by the TypeScript agent after receiving HTTP 402 response.      Verifies the validator's signature, checks budget, transfers USDT,      and records the payment on-chain.

params.nonce: Unique nonce to prevent replay attacks
params.service: Address receiving the USDT (merchant or service wallet)

processX402PaymentDirect(address,uint256.details: Used for MVP demo where agent is its own validator

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

USDT_TOKEN().notice: USDT token on ArepaPay L1 (6 decimals)

autonomousMode().notice: Whether the agent operates without human confirmation

dailyBudget().notice: Daily spending limit in USDT (6 decimals)

depositUSDT(uint256).notice: Deposit USDT into the agent's budget

execute(address,uint256,bytes).notice: Execute an arbitrary call on behalf of the agent (ERC-8004)

paymentValidators(address).notice: Addresses authorized to submit x402 payment requests

processX402Payment(address,uint256,strin.notice: Process an x402 payment for API access

processX402PaymentDirect(address,uint256.notice: Simpler x402 payment — no signature required, owner/validator direct call

spentToday().notice: Amount spent today (resets at UTC midnight)

usedNonces(uint256).notice: Anti-replay: nonces that have been consumed
